title: Nostalgia Revived
description: Nostalgic Planned, Rummored and Removed Minecraft Features.
body:
Have you ever imagined what would of been if Rubies became a mechanic? or if DinnerBone added Colored Planks?

Now you don't have to imagine Nostalgia Revived adds both removed, planned, and suggested features.

Fabric 1.19

 

ROADMAP:
Quivers. Plated Armor.
